chunks.text: Technical Reports - Laurent El Ghaoui. Towards Efficient and Robust Out-of-Distribution Deep Learning with Implicit Models (EECS-2023-150) Ashwin Ganesh. Safety Methods for Robotic Systems (EECS-2022-31) Chia-Yin Shih. Lifted Neural Networks (EECS-2021-218) Armin Askari, Geoff Negiar, Rajiv Sambarhya and Laurent El Ghaoui. Joint State and Parameter Estimation in Temporal Models (EECS-2018-28) Yusuf Erol, Stuart J. Russell and Laurent El Ghaoui.
chunks.question: What are some recent technical reports by Laurent El Ghaoui?
chunks.answer: Out-of-distribution deep learning, robotic safety, lifted neural networks.

chunks.text: Safe Feature Elimination in Sparse Supervised Learning (EECS-2010-126) Laurent El Ghaoui, Vivian Viallon and Tarek Rabbani. A Convex Upper Bound on the Log-Partition Function for Binary Graphical Models (EECS-2007-146) Laurent El Ghaoui. A Direct Formulation for Sparse PCA Using Semidefinite Programming (CSD-04-1330) Alexandre d'Aspremont, Laurent El Ghaoui, Michael I. Jordan and Gert R. G. Lanckriet.
chunks.question: What topics are covered in these technical reports?
chunks.answer: Sparse learning, graphical models, sparse PCA.

chunks.text: Robust Markov Decision Processes with Uncertain Transition Matrices (M04/28) A. Nilim and Laurent El Ghaoui. Robust Classification with Interval Data (CSD-03-1279) Laurent El Ghaoui, Gert R. G. Lanckriet and Georges Natsoulis. Multi-Stage Resource Allocation Under Uncertainty (M03/45) G. Calafiore, Laurent El Ghaoui and A. Nilim. A Robust Minimax Approach to Classification (CSD-02-1218) Gert R. G. Lanckriet, Laurent El Ghaoui, Chiranjib Bhattacharyya and Michael I. Jordan.
chunks.question: What is a common theme in these reports?

chunks.text: Learning the Kernel Matrix with Semi-Definite Programming (CSD-02-1206) Gert R. G. Lanckriet, Nello Cristianini, Peter Bartlett, Laurent El Ghaoui and Michael I. Jordan. Static Arbitrage Bounds on Basket Option Price (M02/33) A. d'Aspremont and Laurent El Ghaoui. Robust Solutions to Markov Decision Problems with Uncertain Transition Matrices The Design and Implementation of an Ultra Low Power RF Oscillator Using Micromachined Resonators (M02/31) Laurent El Ghaoui, A. Nilim and P. Otis.
chunks.question: What methods are applied in these reports?
chunks.answer: Semi-definite programming, arbitrage bounds, robust solutions.

chunks.text: Estimation of Transition Probability Matrices in Credit Risk Analysis (M00/60) Laurent El Ghaoui, M. Oks and A. Varma. Worst-Case Value-at-Risk and Robust Asset Allocation: A Semidefinite Programming Approach (M00/59) Laurent El Ghaoui, F. Oustry and M. Oks. Process Variation Analysis for MEMS Design (M00/44) L. Schenato, W-C. Wu, Laurent El Ghaoui and Kristofer Pister.
chunks.question: What applications are discussed in these reports?
chunks.answer: Credit risk, asset allocation, MEMS design.
